summary: Iteration 5 - JWT Authentication Testing. All 11 backend auth tests passed (100%). Frontend auth flow works correctly: login page displays, login with correct credentials works, dashboard loads with user email, logout redirects to login. Minor UI bug: wrong password shows technical error message instead of user-friendly message.

ui_bugs.issue: Wrong password shows technical error 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' instead of 'Invalid email or password'

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login with correct credentials returns token and user data (200)
GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns user data
POST /api/auth/logout clears cookies and returns success
Frontend: Login page displays when not authenticated (data-testid='login-page')
Frontend: Login form has email input (data-testid='login-email-input')
Frontend: Login form has password input (data-testid='login-password-input')
Frontend: Login form has submit button (data-testid='login-submit-btn')
Frontend: After login, dashboard loads with user email shown (data-testid='user-email')
Frontend: After logout, redirects back to login page
Frontend: Wrong password shows error message (data-testid='login-error') - but message is technical
action_items: Fix error message display in LoginPage - currently shows technical error instead of API error message
critical_code_review_comments: The authApi.login function error handling may have an issue with response body being read twice - needs investigation

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all flows work, minor error message display issue)

seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on startup from ADMIN_EMAIL and ADMIN_PASSWORD env vars
context_for_next_testing_agent: JWT authentication is fully working. Backend auth endpoints all pass. Frontend login/logout flow works. Token stored in localStorage as 'fx_token' and httpOnly cookies. Minor issue: error message for wrong password shows technical error instead of 'Invalid email or password'. All previous features (prices, signals, events, risk control, event response engine, execution gate, strategy monitor) continue to work.

mocked_apis_list: Market price data (simulated - no real Twelve Data API key)

auth_implementation_verified.token_type: JWT with access_token (1hr) and refresh_token (7 days)
auth_implementation_verified.admin_seeding: seed_admin_user() on startup, updates password if changed
